description: Lock early_medicine to broad medieval learned and practical medicine, not a narrow surgery or herbal-preparation node.

checks.reason: The node remains a century-level medieval scope, with explicit date uncertainty for inherited classical texts, monastic transmission, and practical treatment traditions.
Herbal remedies are a treatment component in medieval medicine but do not define the whole learned-medical tradition.
Monastic manuscript preservation enabled learned medical transmission while medicine also existed in lay and Arabic scholarly contexts.
Ancient surgery is procedural lineage for limited medieval surgery, not a direct enabling requirement for all early medicine.
